title: cxxrtl RFE: helper methods to cast internal data representation to bool, integer, etc.
body:
Right now, when the main wrapper around a CXXRTL model wants to access the value of a port or signal, it needs to dive into the internal data representation of the model.

Like this:
```c
        int cur_led = top.p_led.curr.data[0];
```

For a cxxrtl user, `curr` and `data` are implementation details that should be hidden and that might change as internal specializations are implemented (e.g to increase performance)

CXXRTL needs some casting function remove the need to do this:

* convert single-bit wires to bool
* convert vectors up to 64-bit to int64_t or uint64_t.
* methods to access values in 64-bit chunks for vectors larger than 64 bits
* methods to access locations inside a memory
